context.user_action: Typing in terminal (w, d, enter, p, w, d, enter)
error_sequence: ❌ Cannot send input - socket not connected
❌ Cannot send input - socket not connected
❌ Cannot send input - socket not connected

root_cause.secondary: Socket.IO connection not maintained during terminal interaction
evidence: Backend shows PTY launched successfully with PID 12153
Backend receiving terminal data (98 chars prompt)
Frontend receiving keyboard input but socket disconnected
No WebSocket error logs in frontend debug output

symptoms: Terminal canvas displays correctly (manual injection working)
Backend PTY running but no communication path
failure_pattern.impact: Terminal appears functional but no commands execute

previous_attempts.approach: Enhanced terminal initialization with DOM validation
previous_attempts.limitation: Did not address WebSocket connection stability

previous_attempts.approach: Manual canvas injection for renderer failures

solution_requirements: Add automatic reconnection on connection loss
Ensure socket connection persists during terminal interaction
Add connection status indicators to debug logs
Implement connection recovery without terminal restart
success_criteria: WebSocket connection remains active during typing
Input successfully reaches backend PTY process
Terminal output returns to frontend display
No 'Cannot send input - socket not connected' errors
